calibration_requirements.label: Per-shot detector and observable traces are persisted
calibration_requirements.missing_to_promote: Keep the same per-shot schema for calibrated device exports.

calibration_requirements.label: Hardware-like model consumes detector bitstrings
calibration_requirements.missing_to_promote: Preserve detector-bitstring input when replacing the toy observation model.

calibration_requirements.label: Profile sweep and holdout split are present
calibration_requirements.missing_to_promote: Retain model-selection/holdout separation for real calibration sweeps.

calibration_requirements.label: Calibrated flag data is available
calibration_requirements.missing_to_promote: Add calibrated leakage/erasure flag observations with a confusion matrix.

calibration_requirements.label: Real hardware traces are available
calibration_requirements.missing_to_promote: Run the same decoder interface on real or independently calibrated hardware traces.

calibration_requirements.label: Holdout improvement is observed
calibration_requirements.missing_to_promote: Show strictly fewer holdout logical failures under calibrated injection.

calibration_requirements.label: Holdout non-regression is preserved
calibration_requirements.missing_to_promote: Maintain non-regression after replacing the model with calibrated data.

calibration_requirements.label: Stress profile does not introduce failures
calibration_requirements.missing_to_promote: Re-check this guardrail on real high-leakage slices.

calibration_requirements.label: No forbidden production or threshold claim is made
calibration_requirements.missing_to_promote: Keep B2 as a negative-boundary result until C4-C6 pass on stronger data.

claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: The route has no calibrated flag data, no real hardware trace, and no holdout improvement, so it cannot support a production decoder, threshold, low-overhead QEC, or hardware claim.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: The current B2 pipeline has per-shot traces, detector-bitstring input, profile sweeps, holdout accounting, and non-regression under the best hardware-like model.

title: B2 calibration transfer guardrail gate
toolchain: Consumes the B2 per-shot trace packet, posterior injection gate, DEM-informed edge semantics gate, and hardware-like leakage gate; checks whether the model has enough calibration-transfer evidence to support production-decoder, threshold, or hardware claims.
